title: Evaluate water supply for irrigation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate water supply for irrigation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine water needs for irrigation

pcs.text: Determine the water needs of plants to be irrigated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the water needs of plants to be irrigated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the water needs of plants to be irrigated.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the permeability of the soil and deep drainage losses.

pcs.text: Calculate evapotranspiration rates through the growing season

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate evapotranspiration rates through the growing season.

pcs.text: Calculate soil water deficits throughout the season based on expected rainfall

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate soil water deficits throughout the season based on expected rainfall.

pcs.text: Calculate the amount of irrigation water required through the growing season
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the amount of irrigation water required through the growing season?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the amount of irrigation water required through the growing season.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine water needs for irrigation

elements.title: Assess a water source for water quality

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate regulatory requirements for sourcing irrigation water and incorporate into business planning.
